system.text: You are Claude, an AI assistant made by Anthropic. You are helping a software engineer debug and improve a Python codebase. Always explain your reasoning, cite the relevant code, and suggest tests. Be precise and concise.
The user is working on a vLLM-based inference runtime. Project conventions: Python 3.12, four-space indentation, snake_case functions, PascalCase classes, type annotations on public interfaces.

content.text: The sort is ascending, so the highest numeric priority ends up last. If you only take the first element elsewhere, you get the lowest priority.
Good catch. Please rewrite it to sort descending and add a unit test.
